title: Indonesia and Russia Remain China's Primary Sources For Coal Imports
section_path: Indonesia and Russia Remain China's Primary Sources For Coal Imports
section_path_text: Indonesia and Russia Remain China's Primary Sources For Coal Imports
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Coal import data for September by origin has been released and shows that imports from Indonesia have remained China's primary source and Russia the second largest source. Imports from Indonesia totaled 20.7 million tons, which is up from August by 4.9 million tons (31%) but down year-on-year by 700,000 tons (-3%). Image reference: Chart 1 (60).jpg | assets/2022-11-09_indonesia-and-russia-remain-chinas-primary-sources-for-coal-imports_img_chart1286029_8a5c3a8ec6c0.jpg
Imports from Russia totaled 7 million tons, which is down from August by 1.5 million tons (-18%) but up year-on-year by 1.2 million tons (21%).
